assertions.assertion: Output contains 'AddBff()' with '.ConfigureOpenIdConnect' replacing the manual AddAuthentication/AddCookie/AddOpenIdConnect setup
assertions.rationale: Shows AddBff().ConfigureOpenIdConnect().ConfigureCookies() and the manual AddAuthentication/AddCookie/AddOpenIdConnect is completely removed from code
MapBffManagementEndpoints does not appear in any code block. It is mentioned only in a comment explaining its removal and in the summary table — the migrated code does not call it.
Shows .WithAccessToken(RequiredTokenType.User) in the code. RequireAccessToken does not appear in code blocks.

assertions.assertion: Output contains '.AddRemoteApis()' since V4 requires it for remote API endpoints
Output preserves the original OIDC settings (Authority, ClientId, ClientSecret, ResponseType, scopes)
assertions.rationale: Preserves Authority='https://identity.example.com', ClientId='spa', ClientSecret='secret', ResponseType='code', Scope.Add('api1'), SaveTokens=true, and cookie settings
